properties.Test Case: When publishing (all formats: PDF, BloomPUB, ePUB, Web, Video) a book with licensed content, stop publishing and show an error if one of the langs lacks a license in our spreadsheet. Test with a super bible book from here. After closing the error message box, try to proceed with saving the book anyhow, over WiFi, over USB cable, etc. to ensure all publishing paths are truly closed.
properties.Steps: When publishing (all formats: PDF, BloomPUB, ePUB, Web, Video) a book with licensed content, stop publishing and show an error if one of the langs lacks a license in our spreadsheet. Test with a super bible book from here. After closing the error message box, try to proceed with saving the book anyhow, over WiFi, over USB cable, etc. to ensure all publishing paths are truly closed.
